messages.content: Just got back from walking Biscuit this morning, the park near my place was packed.
Nice! Hope Biscuit had a good time.
Yeah he loves chasing squirrels. Border collies have endless energy.
Border collies are notorious for that — smart but high-energy.
Also adopted a cat last weekend. Her name is Pepper, a tabby. Biscuit is still figuring out what to do with her.
Two pets now! That introduction phase can take a while.
